lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: Who have we got here...?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: H... Hello.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: So you think you're good enough to win this game, eh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm counting on it.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: We shall see about that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how does this game work?

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: The aim of the game is to reach 250 points as fast as you can.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: To earn points you simply have to put the gingerbread in your hopper.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: Of course, there's a catch. Each gingerbread has different qualities, thus different point values. I'll let you figure out which one is best.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: Here's a hint: don't put any red and crumbled gingerbread into your hopper. It will give you negative points.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: You can be cheeky and put those inside other competitor's hoppers, as a saboteur.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: I expect only the highest quality of gingerbread in my establishment.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: Keep one eye on the other players as they might try to slow you down.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I want to have a look around first.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: I'll be waiting!

sections.title: When the player is given bad gingerbread

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: Be careful, you've got some awful gingerbread with you... I wouldn't put them in your hopper, maybe another player's?

sections.title: After the player completes the second game

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: You must now answer the hardest riddle known to gnomekind, in order to proceed to the final!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm ready.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: I am tall when I am young, and I am short when I am old.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A Gnome?

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: Well yes, I am a gnome, but the riddle wasn't about me!

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: Gosh what I wouldn't give to be tall when I was young.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: Have another go.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: That's not quite right, have another go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A Human! Ha, I've got it.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: Sadly not correct [player name].

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: You seem very old, you've been round here a while. You're not shorter than me though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, that's not hard.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: Don't be cheeky [player name]! Now quickly solve this riddle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A candle?

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: That's correct!

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: Good luck in the final [player name]. You're going to need it.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: How's it going [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm pine thanks, I still have crumbs in places I didn't know I had.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: Icy what you did there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you enjoy it here?

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: Absolutely, I've had some of the best times in my life doing all this quality control.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: I wouldn't be the gnome I am today without it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds lovely.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what's your story?

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: Good question, where do I begin...

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: I used to be a Head Chef at the Tree Gnome Stronghold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yeah?

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: I was the best of the best.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: WHERE'S THE FROG SAUCE! I used to shout.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: Great times.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Then you ended up in Santa's Nutcracker Pub?

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: You know it. Apparently Santa was getting complaints about the quality of his gingerbread gnomes.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: So he asked me to step in. Free ticket onto his Nice List too.

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: I mean just look at this place. It's amazing!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It is indeed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Happy Holidays!

lines.speaker: Gnome inspector
lines.text: You too [player name].
